nasb.text: You shall not go about as a slanderer among your people, and you are not to act against the life of your neighbor; I am the Lord.

esv.text: You shall not go around as a slanderer among your people, and you shall not stand up against the life of your neighbor: I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 你不可在你的族人中，到處搬弄是非，也不可危害你的鄰舍；我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 不可到处搬弄是非，不可危害邻居的生命安全。我是耶和华。
